title: Tom May
compiled_truth: Tom May is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-11 to 2002-02-25), Tom May sent 48 and received 652 emails, totalling 700 interactions. Top correspondents: [Lloyd Will](people/lloyd-will) (13), [Kayne Coulter](people/kayne-coulter) (13), [Narsimha Misra](people/narsimha-misra) (10), [Reagan Rorschach](people/reagan-rorschach) (9), [Jeffrey Miller](people/jeffrey-miller) (9). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, ema_s, enron_power, inbox, services.
